subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, that thou hast quaffed the choice wine of divine knowledge from the bounteous hand of thy Lord and hast been illumined by the rays of the Sun of Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله رحیق عرفان را از ید عطای الهی آشامیدی و بانوار شمس ظهور منور شدی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
